name: afeto-sac
description: Sistema de SAC para Clínicas - Afeto SAC

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:functions
scripts.build:functions: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && cd .. && npx prisma generate --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma

author: Afeto
